name: scrapecreators
description: Multi-merchant social media scraping across AIsa (X/Twitter — Circle x402 catalog, DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched), StableSocial (Instagram + TikTok — MPP, ROUTED via the SELAT Router), and Clado (LinkedIn — MPP, ROUTED): profiles, tweets, posts, company pages, and hashtag/keyword searches. Mixed rail; each capability is compiled into a selat-pay call by the selat CLI.

handle.description: Social handle without @ (used by the X/Twitter, Instagram, and TikTok profile/posts lookups).

tweetId.description: Numeric tweet ID for the X/Twitter tweet-details lookup (AIsa takes tweet IDs, not tweet URLs).

instagramHandle.description: Instagram handle for the secondary profile lookup (StableSocial resolves profiles by handle; replaces the old numeric userId lookup).

hashtag.description: TikTok hashtag to search for, without #.

steps.label: X/Twitter profile — AIsa Twitter API (Circle x402 catalog; DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched)
X/Twitter user tweets — AIsa Twitter API (Circle x402 catalog; DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched)
X/Twitter tweet details — AIsa Twitter API (Circle x402 catalog; DIRECT, Circle Gateway-batched)
LinkedIn profile — Clado (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
LinkedIn post — Clado scrape (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
LinkedIn company page — Clado scrape (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
Instagram profile — StableSocial (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
Instagram profile by handle — StableSocial (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
Instagram recent posts — StableSocial (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
TikTok profile — StableSocial (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
TikTok hashtag search — StableSocial (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
TikTok trending via keyword search — StableSocial (MPP, ROUTED via SELAT Router)
